scripts.deploy:netlify: npm run build && npx -y netlify-cli deploy --prod --dir=dist --site=5a7c0fa9-62b2-4137-a109-8a7478bf6148
scripts.deploy:netlify:preview: npm run build && npx -y netlify-cli deploy --dir=dist --site=5a7c0fa9-62b2-4137-a109-8a7478bf6148
scripts.deploy:firebase:hosting: npm run build && npx -y firebase-tools@latest deploy --only hosting
